name: Shihuang Qin
description: Qin Shi Huang was the founder of the Qin Dynasty and the first emperor to unify China. His real name is Ying Zheng. Qin Shi Huang, also known as Shi Huang Di, literally means "First Emperor of Qin". He is widely regarded as the greatest Chinese emperor of all time despite sometimes being viewed as a tyrant.

name: Sing Soo-Ling
description: **Height:** 165 cm, 191 cm (Garden of Light) **Nationality:** Chinese-American Sing Soo-Ling is the current leader of the Chinatown mafia, the younger half-brother of Lao Yen Tai.

description: Tao is one of the main protagonists in Gokurakugai manga series. name: Teru Minamoto
description: Minamoto Teru is a 2nd year student at Kamome Academy's High School Division and the school's Student Council President. He is also a member of a renowned family of exorcists, the Minamoto Clan. Teru is Kou's older brother.

name: Alexander Anderson
nativeName: アレクサンド・アンデルセン神父
description: Alexander Anderson is the trump card of Iscariot - section XIII, the secret organization of the Catholic church created to fight the undead. Little is known about his background, other than his many nicknames and victories, and his biotech regeneration. Anderson first meets Alucard on a mission in Northern Ireland, and their paths cross many times afterwards. Anderson is seemingly possessed by the thought of defeating Alucard...How far is he willing to go in order to defeat his foe?
